overview.description: The Direxion Daily Energy Bear 2X ETF (ERY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Energy Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US large-cap companies in the energy industry. ERY was launched on Nov 6, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.
